title: pelargonium cotyledonis
intro: Pelargonium cotyledonis, also known as the Cape marigold or zinc plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium cotyledonis include relief from colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as improved digestion and immune function. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
